title: MT❯3 Voted Canadian Lawyer Readers’ Choice Favourite in Litigation Support and e-Discovery Consultants for Fourth Time
content:
## MT❯3 Voted Canadian Lawyer Readers’ Choice Favourite in Litigation Support and e-Discovery Consultants for Fourth Time
November 29, 2023 – MT❯3, Canada’s premier e-Discovery practice and a division of McCarthy Tétrault, has once again received a Canadian Lawyer Readers’ Choice Award in the category of Litigation Support and e-Discovery Consultants . The 2023 win marks the fourth time that MT❯3 has been honoured with the prestigious award. MT❯3’s consistent recognition in the category highlights the significant impact the division continues to have on innovating Canada’s legal industry.
MT❯3’s specialized team of lawyers, technical analysts, and project managers provides comprehensive, tailored solutions in digital information management and e-Discovery, due diligence, managed document review, and technology strategy. Its expertise and collaborative approach ensure that clients receive high-value, integrated services that align with their unique requirements.
“We are grateful for the consistent recognition from Canadian Lawyer readers. Being chosen as their preferred litigation and e-Discovery firm reflects our commitment to innovation and client service delivery,” said Susan Wortzman , McCarthy Tétrault partner and leader of MT❯3. “Our clients inspire us to pioneer services and strategies that simplify and streamline the management of complex digital information. This award not only reflects the individual efforts of our MT❯3 team, but also underscores the firm’s collective commitment to setting new standards of excellence in the legal field.”
The annual Canadian Lawyer Readers’ Choice Awards recognize top legal vendors and suppliers. Voters cast thousands of votes every year across different categories to highlight the businesses they rely on to achieve their legal goals.
MT❯3, formerly Wortzmans, is Canada’s leading law firm specializing in providing advice and services relating to the management of digital information. MT❯3 offers a wide range of legal, strategic and technical services, particularly in e-Discovery, information governance and technology strategy.
About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact media@mccarthy.ca .
